items.title: Release workflow parity + first tag publish proof
items.why: 001A and 001B complete: tag v0.3.0-alpha.1 with filled evidence in docs/releases/PR-PLAT-NP-001-release-parity-evidence.md.

items.title: Real Conexus package-mode compatibility
items.why: Conexus CI now includes a package-mode job + MSBuild switch; keep backlog open until green on main and version policy documented for published feeds.

items.title: Supply-chain workflow first-run evidence
items.why: Workflow definitions are good, but runner behavior/permissions must be proven.

items.title: Donor and incoming-package hygiene
items.why: Coordination artifacts should not leak into distributable package or documentation surfaces.

items.title: README/docs accuracy pass
items.why: Docs changed rapidly; stale claims around package count/release behavior/resilience are high-risk.

items.title: Deferred-item register
items.why: PR-PLAT-003 and PR-PLAT-012 should be explicitly deferred or re-scoped.

items.title: Secret resolver reference parser
items.why: Conexus is starting to need resolver-agnostic references such as env:NAME instead of env-var-specific option names.

items.title: In-memory warning coverage expansion
items.why: Artifact warning tests exist; warning coverage should be symmetrical across all platform in-memory stores.
